reason: Original evidence (recorded inline in this story's evidence/index.md — no separate per-record file exists) pinned base commit SHA 733ef3e, which is not an ancestor of current HEAD (side effect of the e8cda6b squash noted by the wave-07 autopsy, finding H-8, remediation R-6). Per impl/governance/evidence-policy.md's revision-pinning rule, this addendum re-runs the cited command against the current, ancestor-valid HEAD and records the result as status `retested`, without overwriting the original index.md row.
